stem: A program reads two whole numbers A and B from the user and outputs the larger of the two. If the two numbers are equal, the program outputs either value.
model_answer: Start terminator. Input A and B. Decision: A > B? Yes branch outputs A; No branch outputs B. Both branches join at a Stop terminator. Arrows are labelled Yes / No on the decision's outgoing edges.

parts.label: (a)
parts.prompt: Draw a flowchart for the program. Use the correct shapes (terminator, input/output, decision) and label the two branches of the decision Yes and No.

mark_points.text: Start and Stop terminators at the ends of the flowchart
Input step reads A and B
Decision A > B with Yes and No branches labelled
Each branch outputs the correct value before Stop
